label: Task lists — instant on return, faster on first paint
items: Tap a Quick Access tile, navigate around, come back — your task list now paints instantly from cache instead of re-loading. The data still refreshes in the background, so completing a task elsewhere reflects within a beat.

First-visit task lists now paint as soon as the names and dates load (~150ms) rather than waiting for plant thumbnails and dependency badges to also arrive. The thumbnails and badges fill in within another few hundred milliseconds — the page feels alive sooner.
Tapping the Today tile on Quick Access now prefetches today's task list in the background while the calendar screen loads, so it's there waiting by the time you arrive.

label: Behind the scenes
items: TaskEngine now has a 60-second in-memory cache keyed on the fetch's input signature, plus in-flight deduplication so a prefetch + the screen's own fetch share a single request.
Realtime updates (someone completing a task in another tab) invalidate the cache for that home automatically. No risk of showing stale data.
